event: Ukrainian defense firms seeking French co-production deals signals European FPV component demand expansion — 24+ Ukrainian companies met French counterparts April 9-10 2026 to establish joint ventures, following Germany (11 JVs) and Spain (5 JVs) model.

Article reports 'more than two dozen Ukrainian defense companies traveled to Paris this week'.
probability_basis: Confirmed meetings and CEO statement on JV disparity, but actual co-production deals and component demand impact remain speculative. France's current low JV count (1 vs Germany's 11) suggests slower uptake than peers.

Large multi-vendor pool competing for shared optical/RF sensor components used in both satellite and high-altitude drone payloads.
